description: Unsecured guardrail at level 24 perimeter edge
immediate_action: Area barricaded and flagging installed

description: Tower crane swing radius encroaching on adjacent building setback
immediate_action: Crane operator notified and swing limiter adjusted

description: Trench wall showing signs of instability near wing C foundation
immediate_action: Workers evacuated and trench box repositioned

description: Steel beam dropped from crane during erection at platform level
immediate_action: Work stopped area cleared; beam secured; incident investigation initiated

description: Exposed live conductors in switchgear room during installation
immediate_action: Power isolated and LOTO procedures reinforced

description: Wind speeds approaching crane operation limits at upper floors
immediate_action: Crane operations suspended; crews moved to interior work

description: Incomplete floor opening cover at curtainwall installation area
immediate_action: Opening covered and secured with bolted plywood

description: Inadequate ventilation monitoring in tunnel section C
immediate_action: Additional air monitors deployed and fresh air supply increased

description: Welding operation near combustible cable tray materials
immediate_action: Fire watch posted and combustibles relocated

description: Debris accumulation blocking egress path on level 18
immediate_action: Laborers assigned to clear debris and restore access

description: Pump truck outrigger on unstable ground near excavation edge
immediate_action: Outrigger repositioned to engineered bearing pad

description: Missing mid-rail on exterior scaffold at roof level
immediate_action: Work suspended on scaffold until mid-rail installed

description: Material hoist load shifting during wind gust
immediate_action: Load secured and hoisting suspended until wind subsides

description: Arc flash near miss at temporary power panel during load test
immediate_action: Panel de-energized and PPE requirements upgraded for area

description: Worker observed working at level 28 without fall protection tie-off
immediate_action: Work stopped; worker counseled; safety stand-down conducted

description: Adhesive fumes exceeding PEL in enclosed patient corridor
immediate_action: Area evacuated and ventilation system activated

description: Lightning detected within 10-mile radius of site
immediate_action: All outdoor work ceased; workers sheltered

description: Loose tool dropped from elevated work platform at tower A
immediate_action: Tool tethering enforcement and toe board inspection ordered

description: Water accumulation creating slip hazard at lobby framing area
immediate_action: Pump deployed and absorbent material applied

description: Tower crane #2 anti-collision alarm triggered near crane #1
immediate_action: Both cranes stopped and coordination meeting held

description: Safety net system showing damage at curtainwall opening
immediate_action: Net replaced and additional inspection stations scheduled

description: Underground utility strike during drainage trench excavation
immediate_action: Work stopped; utility company notified; potholing required

description: Diesel fuel leak detected at generator testing area
immediate_action: Spill kit deployed and fuel line repaired

description: Existing floor joist showing unusual deflection during demo
immediate_action: Area shored and structural engineer notified

description: Guardrail gap at material hoist landing on level 20
immediate_action: Temporary chain secured across opening

description: Epoxy coating application without required respiratory protection
immediate_action: Work stopped; proper RPE distributed and fit-tested

description: Scaffold plank not fully supported at building B corner
immediate_action: Plank repositioned and scaffold inspected

description: Extension cords creating trip hazard at loading dock
immediate_action: Cords rerouted overhead and secured with cable management

description: Atmospheric monitoring alarm in underground utility vault
immediate_action: Workers evacuated and area ventilated before re-entry

description: Tower crane boom within restricted zone near power lines
immediate_action: Crane repositioned and exclusion zone markers updated

description: Safety harness found with damaged D-ring during morning inspection
immediate_action: All harnesses on site inspected; 3 additional removed from service

description: Open stairwell penetration at parking garage level 2
immediate_action: Barricades and warning signs installed

description: Suspended load swinging in wind during lift operation
immediate_action: Lift postponed; taglines added for next attempt

description: Hot work permit expired during welding on structural steel
immediate_action: Work stopped until permit renewed with fire watch

description: GFCI not functioning on temporary power in resident wing
immediate_action: Outlet replaced and all temporary power GFCIs tested

description: Material staging area obstructing fire lane access
immediate_action: Materials relocated and fire lane restored

description: Formwork showing excessive deflection during deck pour level 5
immediate_action: Pouring suspended; formwork reinforced and reshored

description: Temporary lighting inadequate in tunnel section D
immediate_action: Additional temporary lighting installed before work resumed

description: Scaffold base plates not on proper mudsills at gymnasium
immediate_action: Work suspended and mudsills installed

description: Smoke detected in cable tray during energization testing
immediate_action: Power isolated; source identified as overheated connection

description: Ice formation on steel at upper floors after overnight freeze
immediate_action: Salt applied and anti-slip measures implemented

description: Concrete dust levels exceeding limits during interior demo
immediate_action: Additional dust suppression water misting deployed

description: Rescue tripod missing at manhole entry for drainage work
immediate_action: Entry suspended until rescue equipment deployed

description: Lockout/tagout procedure not followed during UPS maintenance
immediate_action: Work stopped; LOTO procedure review conducted on site

description: Ladder not secured at top during kitchen installation work
immediate_action: Ladder tied off and ladder safety training reviewed

description: Material delivery truck encroaching on crane tail swing radius
immediate_action: Truck repositioned and spotter assigned

description: Skylight opening unprotected at roof level during solar install
immediate_action: Skylight covered and flagged immediately

description: Scrap metal accumulation near worker walkway at parking area
immediate_action: Cleanup crew deployed and dumpster relocated closer

description: Unusual cracking observed in concrete column at restaurant level
immediate_action: Column shored and structural engineer inspection scheduled

description: Battery storage area temperature exceeding safe limits
immediate_action: Cooling system activated and batteries inspected

description: Safety net pocket sagging at level 26 curtainwall area
immediate_action: Net retensioned and support cables inspected

description: Crane load chart exceeded during interior equipment placement
immediate_action: Load reduced and rigging plan revised

description: Heavy rain creating ponding on platform structure
immediate_action: Pumps deployed and work on slippery surfaces suspended

description: Damaged cable insulation found on DC string wiring
immediate_action: Section isolated and cable replaced

description: Porta-john blocking emergency egress route at ground level
immediate_action: Unit relocated to designated area

description: MRI room sealant off-gassing exceeding ventilation capacity
immediate_action: Additional exhaust fans deployed and entry restricted

description: Material falling from canopy structure during glazing install
immediate_action: Exclusion zone expanded below work area

description: Ground fault detected during generator paralleling test
immediate_action: System de-energized and fault traced to wiring error

description: Temporary stair missing intermediate landing handrail
immediate_action: Handrail installed before stair returned to service

description: Existing brick veneer separation detected during restoration
immediate_action: Area cordoned off and masonry specialist consulted
